steps: Submit Form 5001 to French tax authorities requesting EUR 3,744.00 WHT reimbursement under FR-NO treaty Article 10
Provide BNP Paribas with Norwegian tax residency certificate and treaty claim documentation
Reference TotalEnergies SE dividend payment showing 15% treaty rate vs 13.5% applied rate
Follow up with French tax administration within 3-year statute of limitations for treaty benefits

references.title: impots.gouv.fr – Form 5001 (Reimbursement of WHT on Dividends)
